name: Salts Used in Pickling
recipeInstructions:
1. For quick pickles, reduced-sodium salts like "Lite Salt" can be used as specified in the recipe.
2. When making fermented pickles, avoid using reduced-sodium salts to prevent an altered taste.
3. Be aware that adding non-caking materials to table salts can cloud the brine; flake salt is not recommended due to its varying density.
